coordinateConvention.note: JSON x/y are parent-relative Figma coords. Export derives them from Unity rootX/rootY minus the Figma template parent's rootX/rootY.

layoutAdjustments.note: Unity baked x/y no longer matches template Auto Layout; layoutMode set to NONE for these nodes.

node.name: item-hint
node.characters: Merge similar items to upgrade them!

item.text: Merge similar items to upgrade them!
